input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by how strongly each one compels a viewer to share it with someone else.

items.description: A cat picture to evaluate for the strength of the urge it creates to immediately show it to another person.

input_merge.$starlark: [item for sublist in input for item in sublist]
[item for sublist in input for item in sublist]

description: Ranks cat pictures by emotional resonance — how powerfully each image provokes genuine feeling. Evaluates three dimensions: immediacy of impact (the gut-punch first reaction), depth of feeling (lingering emotional weight), and urge to share (compulsion to show someone). Technical quality is irrelevant; only the strength of feeling matters.

input_schema.description: A collection of cat pictures to rank by emotional resonance.

items.description: A picture of a cat to evaluate for the depth and immediacy of emotional response it provokes.
